summary.headline: Archer-Daniels-Midland issues $500 million in 4.500% Notes due 2033.
summary.narrative_summary: Archer-Daniels-Midland Company issued $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 4.500% Notes due 2033. The offering was underwritten by representatives of underwriters named in Schedule II to the underwriting agreement dated March 29, 2023. The company filed a registration statement on Form S-3 covering the offering.

ma_or_capital_allocation.description: Archer-Daniels-Midland issued $500,000,000 aggregate principal amount of 4.500% Notes due 2033.

extraction_notes: The filing primarily discloses a debt issuance. No earnings or guidance information was provided in the filing.
